summary: Completed comprehensive testing of Cash Piloting Dashboard iteration 4. All backend APIs (21/21 tests passed) and frontend UI components working correctly. Horizon selector (12/24/36M), scenario toggle, KPI cards, projection chart, Quick Add form, dialogs, and Monthly P&L panel all functional.

console_warnings.issue: Chart width/height warnings (-1) during initial render - non-blocking
Missing accessibility descriptions for DialogContent - non-blocking

context_for_next_testing_agent: All features from iteration 4 requirements verified: Horizon selector (12/24/36 months) correctly updates chart and data, Scenario toggle (Committed/Likely/Extended/Full) filters flows by certainty, KPI cards show Cash Now/Goes Negative/Lowest Point/First Breach/Status, Monthly P&L Panel shows revenue/cost/net when month selected, Quick Add form creates flows successfully, Entry Log/Bank Accounts/Settings dialogs all functional. Linked flows with percentage calculation working correctly. Entity filter works with 6 entities.
passed_tests: Backend: GET /api/projection with horizon=12 returns 12 months
Backend: GET /api/projection with horizon=24 returns 24 months
Backend: GET /api/projection with horizon=36 returns 36 months
Backend: Projection response includes cash_now, lowest_cash, first_danger_month, first_watch_month, overall_status
Backend: POST /api/cash-flows/batch creates parent + linked child with percentage calculation
Backend: PUT /api/cash-flows/{id} propagates changes to children (recurrence, certainty, amount)
Backend: GET /api/cash-flows/with-linked returns grouped parent-child flows
Backend: Entity CRUD operations
Backend: Bank account CRUD operations
Backend: Cash flow CRUD operations
Backend: Settings CRUD operations
Backend: GET /api/month-details/{month} returns correct breakdown
Frontend: KPI Cards render all 5 cards (Cash Now, Goes Negative, Lowest Point, First Breach, Status)
Frontend: Horizon Selector switches between 12M, 24M, 36M and chart updates
Frontend: Scenario Toggle switches between Committed, Likely, Extended, Full
Frontend: Projection Chart renders with risk zone colors and tooltips
Frontend: Monthly P&L Panel shows revenue/cost/net when month clicked
Frontend: Quick Add form works - creates flow and resets
Frontend: Entry Log dialog opens and shows 15 flows
Frontend: Bank Accounts dialog opens and shows accounts
Frontend: Settings dialog opens and allows buffer change
Frontend: Entity filter works with 7 options (All + 6 entities)
